note: Stage-1 ROUND 2 (audio, bGPT, ljspeech). Round-1 winner = lr 3e-4, epochs 3, lora_r 32, train_interval 4 (online 1.760, delta 2.37%) — all on edges; every train_interval=16 run OOM'd. Round 2 extends the edges: lr up, epochs up, r up, and train_interval DOWN to [2,4] (4 was the min/best; smaller = more updates AND less memory), + the MLP axis. train_interval is kept <=4 (16 OOM'd; +MLP/r64 raise memory, but small train_interval keeps the encode batch small). audio_clips=128 (was under-provisioned in round 1). If lora_r=64 + MLP still OOMs at train_interval 4, drop to [2] or ask for the micro-batch fix.
